raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Self-reflective acknowledgment of epistemic limits on emotional data",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Feelings constitute genuine data about the speaker's internal condition",
    "Feelings can misrepresent external states of affairs",
    "The speaker possesses the capacity to distinguish these two functions"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent; distinguishes subjective informational value from objective accuracy without contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "Speaker or audience tends to treat feelings as direct reports of external reality; context requires improved emotional granularity or reduced affective realism",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "Used to dismiss all emotional information as irrelevant, or when feelings are in fact reliable indicators of external conditions"
}
